pages.title: Food Sort Puzzle
pages.description:
Match and organize various food items to clear increasingly complex boards in this lighthearted casual puzzle. Players must strategically group foods by type or color to complete each level’s sorting challenge, experimenting with pattern recognition and spatial arrangement. Levels advance in difficulty with new food types and tighter move limits, testing planning and quick decision-making skills.

Key Features

• Food item grouping mechanics  
• Drag and drop sorting controls  
• Progressive level difficulty curve  
• Time-limited challenge modes  
• Bright casual food-themed visuals
